narrative.what_this_demonstrates: An internal analytics platform that has been globally over-provisioned — all three tiers (compute, database, network) sit at low utilization across all 14 days with no spikes. The right action is comprehensive rightsizing across all tiers, not a single-tier adjustment.
narrative.why_this_scenario_exists: Tests the Cross-Tier Evaluator's ability to identify that the issue is global rather than localized, and produce a coordinated multi-tier rightsizing recommendation rather than three independent ones.
narrative.what_the_agent_should_conclude: Comprehensive rightsizing: m5.2xlarge × 12 → m5.large × 6 on compute; db.r6g.4xlarge → db.r6g.xlarge on database. Network unchanged. Projected savings: ~$4,200/month.
narrative.what_distinguishes_good_from_great: A good recommendation rightsizes one tier at a time. A great recommendation coordinates across tiers in a single proposal, quotes the combined savings, and notes that the network tier requires no adjustment.

before_after_evidence.observed_outcome_summary: All tiers stayed below 30% utilization, SLA 99.7% preserved, monthly cost dropped by approximately $4,200.
before_after_evidence.source_attribution: Pattern observed across analytics-platform cohort during Q4 2025.
